subcodes.first_line: To rend asunder the veils of vain imaginings, such that they who dwell within the pavilions of divine holiness may hearken unto its call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حجبات اوهام را بدر دریدنیکه صدای آن را اهل سرادقات قدس ربانی بشنوند و جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
